title: kind: action
description: A concrete thing to do that the wiki tracks. Cross-cuts kinds — an action can target any catalog entry. Phase 8 workflow primitive: turns documentation into a cockpit.

type.description: Free string; lint promotes to enum once values stabilize. Seeds: cost-cut, migration, ticket, decision, dashboard-watch, follow-up, experiment-launch.

target.description: Catalog entry name OR external-system id this action affects (e.g. 'nat-0dd49xxx' or 'jira-ticket:CRE-1234')

status.description: Shared base lifecycle per §8 Q4 = c; sub-state lives in `subStatus`

subStatus.description: Optional per-kind extension (free string; promoted later)

source.description: Wiki page that justifies this action (path:line)

blockedBy.description: Other action names this depends on
